seo.homeTitle: C.I.D.C.O. Mitra - Government Services Made Easy
seo.homeDescription: C.I.D.C.O. Mitra provides fast and easy access to government services including property transfers, documentation, and more in Navi Mumbai.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect information that you provide directly to us when using our services, including name, email, phone number, and service requests.
privacy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to process your requests, and to communicate with you.
privacy.section3Content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to provide our services or as required by law.
privacy.section4Content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at cidcomitra@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using C.I.D.C.O. Mitra services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.section2Content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms of Service.
terms.section3Content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue our services at any time without notice.
terms.section4Content: C.I.D.C.O. Mitra shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages resulting from your use of our services.

installPrompt.benefit2: Faster loading - Save data and time
installPrompt.benefit3: Home screen access - One tap to open
